channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Four killed in Ukraine a day after deadliest Russian attacks this year
item.description: At least two people were separately killed in Ukrainian attacks on Russia's border regions.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 16 bracket, Friday schedule, predictions
item.description: Three final Round of 16 spots up for grabs as Argentina, Australia, Cape Verde, Colombia, Egypt, Ghana are in action.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 22: Portugal pulls off dramatic win against Croatia
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: UN warns likelihood of ‘extreme weather events’ as El Nino set to intensify
item.description: World Meteorological Organization forecasts more likelihood of heatwaves, droughts and heavy rainfall due to El Nino.

item.title: $500m for Trump, access for Pakistan: How a crypto-diplomatic bet paid off
item.description: The crypto firm that brought Trump a windfall has also allowed Pakistan to gain clout with US administration.

item.title: EU lawmaker investigating surveillance hacked by Israeli spyware, report says
item.description: Greek former parliamentarian Stelios Kouloglou targeted with Pegasus software, Citizen Lab analysis finds.

item.title: Hundreds of fans cheer Portugal’s win at star team’s residence in Toronto
item.description: Crowds in hundreds of Portugal football fans cheered the star team’s World Cup win.

item.title: How New York’s ‘Little Egypt’ celebrates the World Cup
item.description: The World Cup is bringing New York City’s Egyptian community together in Astoria, Queens.

item.title: Iran’s Khamenei funeral: Which world leaders are attending?
item.description: Several heads of state and other government officials will gather in Tehran for Khamenei's state funeral.

item.title: Seven pro-Palestine protesters convicted of misdemeanour charges in US
item.description: Activists found guilty of misdemeanour counts after blocking San Francisco's Golden Gate Bridge in a 2024 Gaza protest.

item.title: Ukraine strike hits Belgorod, causing fire and power outages
item.description: Ukraine strike hits Belgorod, causing fire and power outages

item.title: Argentina vs Cape Verde: World Cup Round of 32: Messi, prediction, kickoff
item.description: Lionel Messi's Argentina, the reigning champions, face minnows Cape Verde in a last-32 clash in Miami.

item.title: Man holding Tibetan flag dies after setting himself on fire outside UN
item.description: Man described by campaigner as 'a tireless advocate for Tibet' pronounced dead on arrival at hospital.

item.title: At least 40 killed in passenger bus crash in southwest Pakistan
item.description: Bus loses control and falls into rocky ravine near border of Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, officials say.

item.title: Are Europe’s extreme summers the new normal? What the science says
item.description: WHO warns Europe must 'plan for heat like winter flu' as experts reveal how permanent this summer's extreme heat is.

item.title: Delcy Rodriguez responds to public anger at government response
item.description: Delcy Rodriguez says 80% of the buildings that collapsed in earthquakes were privately developed.

item.title: Switzerland beat Algeria 2-0 to reach World Cup Round of 16 in style
item.description: Switzerland remain unbeaten at the 2026 World Cup and will face either Colombia or Ghana in the next game.

item.title: Khamenei’s coffin readied as Iran prepares for seven-day funeral
item.description: Former Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei's coffin has been readied as Iran prepares for seven-day funeral.

item.title: Mapping Iran’s Ali Khamenei funeral: Where mourners will gather each day
item.description: Funeral processions for Iran's late supreme leader will take place between July 3-9 across Iran and Iraq.

item.title: Canada’s Carney secures deal for pipeline to expand oil exports beyond US
item.description: Ottawa says future pipeline will reduce economic dependence on the US amid Donald Trump's trade war.

item.title: Papua rebels claim to have killed US pilot in Indonesia
item.description: A US pilot has been killed in Indonesia’s Papua region after separatist rebels said they shot him.

item.title: Iran warns ships against using unapproved routes in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Military command issues threat a day after Qatari mediators hailed 'positive progress' in indirect US-Iranian talks.

item.title: Who are the rogue bishops defying Pope Leo XIV?
item.description: A rebel group of Roman Catholics has ordained its own bishops in direct defiance of Pope Leo XIV and the Vatican order.

item.title: ‘They gave their best’: Congolese reflect on historic World Cup run
item.description: The Leopards' first World Cup in more than 50 years united Congolese supporters, despite defeat to England.

item.title: Powerful explosion as firefighters probe smoke at Tacoma apartment
item.description: Powerful explosion as firefighters probe smoke at Tacoma apartment.
